{{Quote|Welcome to Bogden Three.|[[Du Mahn]], to [[K'Kruhk]] and [[Sian Jeisel]]|<ref name="Dark Times 6" />}}
'''Bogden 3''', or '''Bogden Three''', was one of the twenty [[Moon/Legends|moons]] of [[Bogden/Legends|Bogden]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].

==History==
{{Quote|So we stopped at the Padawan training center on Bogden Three for repairs. That's where our clone troopers turned on us. We fought them—trying to protect the younglings. It was only Jeisel's sacrifice that allowed us to escape.|[[K'Kruhk]], to [[Zao]]|<ref name="Dark Times—Fire Carrier 2">[[Dark Times—Fire Carrier 2|''Dark Times—Fire Carrier'' 2]]</ref>}}
Just before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] built a [[Bogden Jedi chapter house|small chapter house]] on Bogden 3 to accommodate [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi younglings]] awaiting to be trained on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="FDCR" /> [[K'Kruhk]] and [[Sian Jeisel]] stopped there after the [[Siege of Saleucami/Legends|Siege of Saleucami]] when their [[Theta-class T-2c shuttle/Legends|''Theta''-class T-2c shuttle]] was damaged en route to [[Mygeeto/Legends|Mygeeto]]. At this point, [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] was given to their accompanying [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], and Sian was [[Massacre on Bogden 3|killed]] while buying time for K'Kruhk and a group of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] younglings from the [[Soaring Hawkbat Clan]] to escape.<ref name="Dark Times 6" />

{{Moon-stub}}
